title: Flame Pixelmon 1.12.2
description: An optimized modpack for Minecraft that combines performance, aesthetics and fun gameplay.
body:
Welcome to Flame - Pixelmon! Come have hours of fun exploring the true world of Pixelmon in a fully optimized, friendly, and content-rich environment.

🎮 About our Modpack: Flame Pixelmon - Pixelmon modpack was specially developed for players with low-end computers. Running on Minecraft 1.12.2 with Pixelmon 8.4.3, it provides smooth and stable gameplay without sacrificing quality or immersion in the Pixelmon world.~~

📌 Before downloading, please note: Our focus is to offer a fun, balanced, and rewarding journey. Infinity Pixelmon features unique systems, a customized progression path, and plenty of content to keep you motivated at every step of your adventure.

Every capture, every battle, and every achievement will be a true milestone on our server!

Pixelmon Mod, powered by: https://pixelmonmod.com/
